medinovai-platform-brain.description: Architecture, standards, deploy reference, and governance documentation

medinovai-core-platform.description: Registry, security, audit, identity, workflow, and shared platform libraries

medinovai-security-compliance.description: Encryption, secrets, consent, HIPAA/GDPR guard, and policy tooling

medinovai-data-integration.description: Data services, EPG, lake/ETL, CDR, and supporting data libraries

medinovai-clinical-research.description: CTMS, eClinical stack, LIS, lab routing, and related clinical services

medinovai-experience.description: Customer-facing apps, UI libraries, portals, and multimodal experience tooling

medinovai-infrastructure.description: Deploy automation, canary rollout, telemetry, QA infrastructure, and ops services

notes: migrated_components counts include entries with action migrate or already-in-repo in the migration manifest.
